IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (22450718.pdf)
SUMMARY: Quality-driven and practical Systems Administrator with 5+ years aligning business systems with policies. Strong in analytical, problem-solving, and system administration skills.
SKILLS: analytical, interpersonal, communication, organizational, system administration, UNIX system performance monitoring, team player, self-starter, network management, troubleshooting, debugging, J2EE, LDAP, Linux, Mainframe, Oracle, MS Office (Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Outlook), Windows, database, web applications
